title: Can Superman Save Hollywood?
description:
Superman Trailer Reaction.  
It's fitting that the fate of DC Studios and the superhero film will be determined by Superman. 
No pressure James Gunn.
#Superman #DC
Edited by @QTRBlackGarrett
